## Summary
Briefly explain what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run type-check`

## Impact
Describe potential impacts (UI, performance, behavior).

## Screenshots (if UI)
Add before/after screenshots when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] No debug `console.log`
- [ ] Documentation updated when needed
